## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run widget:typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run tauri:build` when native packaging changes

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Chinese README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Distribution docs updated if packaging changed
- [ ] Architecture docs updated if system boundaries changed

## Safety

- [ ] No private local paths, workspace data, tokens, or certificates are included
- [ ] Destructive local actions require explicit confirmation
